methodology: Pre-registered predictions written before any experiment data is seen

A_finance.description: Download S&P 500 stock returns. Features = daily returns of 20 stocks. Target = next-day return of SPY. Train 50 XGBoost models with different seeds. Compute SHAP.
A_finance.prediction_1: Within-sector stocks (e.g., tech stocks AAPL/MSFT/GOOG) will have higher pairwise SHAP flip rates than cross-sector stocks
A_finance.prediction_2: The within-sector vs between-sector flip rate gap will be positive (within > between)
A_finance.prediction_3: DASH orbit averaging will reduce flip rate for within-sector comparisons
A_finance.prediction_4: The framework's directional prediction holds: correlation-grouped features flip more
A_finance.null_hypothesis: Flip rates are uniform across all stock pairs regardless of sector correlation

B_hyperparameter.description: Use Breast Cancer dataset. Instead of varying random seed only, vary max_depth in {3,4,5,6,7} × learning_rate in {0.01,0.05,0.1,0.2,0.3} = 25 configs × 2 seeds = 50 models.
B_hyperparameter.prediction_1: Feature ranking instability will INCREASE compared to seed-only variation (hyperparameter variation creates a LARGER Rashomon set)
B_hyperparameter.prediction_2: The group structure (correlation groups) will predict instability direction (within > between)
B_hyperparameter.prediction_3: The capacity formula η will correlate with observed gap
B_hyperparameter.null_hypothesis: Hyperparameter variation produces the same instability pattern as seed variation

C_multi_specification.description: Use California Housing. Fit 50 model specifications: vary feature subsets (all 8, drop 1, drop 2 = C(8,1)+C(8,2)+1 = 37 specs, each with 2 seeds ≈ 50+ models). Compute importance for the COMMON features.
C_multi_specification.prediction_1: Features that are retained across more specifications will have MORE stable rankings
C_multi_specification.prediction_2: Correlated features (latitude/longitude) will show within-group instability under specification variation
C_multi_specification.prediction_3: The impossibility applies: specification variation IS a form of Rashomon
C_multi_specification.null_hypothesis: Feature importance is robust to specification choice

D_cross_architecture.description: Use Diabetes dataset. Train 50 models: 17 XGBoost + 17 RandomForest + 16 Ridge. Compare SHAP across architectures.
D_cross_architecture.prediction_1: Within-architecture agreement will be HIGHER than cross-architecture agreement
D_cross_architecture.prediction_2: Correlated features will show higher flip rates in ALL architecture families
D_cross_architecture.prediction_3: DASH across all 50 models (mixed architectures) will produce a more stable ranking than any single architecture's DASH
D_cross_architecture.null_hypothesis: All architectures agree on feature importance rankings
